articles.title: Tom Brady brought jokes, nostalgia, and a comeback tease to Jimmy Fallon ahead of flag football debut
articles.description:
The former Patriots star previewed his flag football debut, reflected on life after football, and showed off his arm on late-night TV.

The post Tom Brady brought jokes, nostalgia, and a comeback tease to Jimmy Fallon ahead of flag football debut appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Tom Brady previewed his flag football debut on Jimmy Fallon, entertaining Boston fans.
Brady showcased his arm strength, reminiscing about his Patriots days on March 18.
Local residents are excited for Brady's return to sports, boosting community engagement.

articles.title: This is the current state of the TSA at Logan Airport
articles.description:
So far, so good, as the majority of TSA agents continue to work despite missing their first paycheck.

The post This is the current state of the TSA at Logan Airport appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: TSA agents at Logan Airport continue working despite missing their first paycheck.
Majority of TSA staff remain on duty, ensuring minimal disruption for travelers.
Local travelers may experience smoother security processes during this period.

articles.title: An AI-rendered Val Kilmer will posthumously appear in a new film
articles.description:
First Line Films announced Wednesday that Kilmer has posthumously joined the cast of a film titled “As Deep as the Grave.”

The post An AI-rendered Val Kilmer will posthumously appear in a new film appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: First Line Films announced Val Kilmer's posthumous role in 'As Deep as the Grave'.
The film utilizes AI technology to recreate Kilmer's likeness for the project.
Boston residents may see a resurgence of interest in local film production and technology.
